creator: joehorn@gmail.com
text:
I will maintain this port.

Thank you.

2008/7/31 Beech Rintoul <beech@freebsd.org>

> Do you wish to maintain this port? We do not accept new ports with
> ports@ as maintainer.
>
> Beech
